texto: Nonviolent action on behalf of justice is no automatic forumla with promise of success: but neither is war. After all, at least half of the people who go to war for some cause deemed worthy of it are defeated.
explicacao: Citação de John Howard Yoder sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Nonviolent action on behalf of justice is no automatic forumla with promise of success: but neith…” articula sucesso, christianity, politics em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como politics e theology.

frase_original: Nonviolent action on behalf of justice is no automatic forumla with promise of success: but neither is war. After all, at least half of the people who go to war for some cause deemed worthy of it are defeated.

texto: If the tradition which claims that war may be justified does not also admit that it could be unjustified, the affirmation is not morally serious. A Christian who prepares the case for a justified war without being equally prepared for hte negative case has not soberly weighted the prima facie presumption that any violence is wrong until the case for an exception has been made.
